name: example-huashu-keynote-black
title: Keynote Black
description: Jobs-2007 / Lei-Jun-launch-event keynote decks: pure black #000000 stage, pure white type, one word or one giant tabular-nums numeral per screen, exactly one brand accent (Mi orange #FF6900 / Spotify green #1ED760 / Apple blue #2997FF) per deck, massive negative space, faint center spotlight, accent-vs-grey spec-comparison bars, and a price-reveal climax page on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design black-big-number-stage (design-styles.md 大胆派「黑底巨型数字剧场」, generated from spec and wrapped in a full multi-section deck shell).

description_i18n.en: Jobs-2007 / Lei-Jun-launch-event keynote decks: pure black #000000 stage, pure white type, one word or one giant tabular-nums numeral per screen, exactly one brand accent (Mi orange #FF6900 / Spotify green #1ED760 / Apple blue #2997FF) per deck, massive negative space, faint center spotlight, accent-vs-grey spec-comparison bars, and a price-reveal climax page on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design black-big-number-stage (design-styles.md 大胆派「黑底巨型数字剧场」, generated from spec and wrapped in a full multi-section deck shell).
description_i18n.zh-CN: Jobs 2007 / 雷军发布会流派主题演讲幻灯片：纯黑 #000000 舞台 + 纯白文字高反差，一屏一词或一个超大 tabular-nums 数字，整套 deck 只选一个品牌强调色（小米橙 #FF6900 / Spotify 绿 #1ED760 / Apple 蓝 #2997FF），大量负空间、极淡中心聚光、强调色对灰色的参数对比条、价格揭晓高潮页，1920×1080 固定画布。基于花叔 huashu-design design-styles.md 大胆派「黑底巨型数字剧场」spec 现场生成，并扩成完整多章节 deck 外壳。

query.en: Create a black-stage {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Keynote Black system (based on huashu-design 黑底巨型数字剧场 / Black Big-Number Stage — Steve Jobs 2007, Lei Jun launch events, Spotify Wrapped, Presentation Zen): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; every page is a pure black #000000 stage with pure white #FFFFFF type at maximum contrast and massive negative space — one idea per screen, never two. Pick exactly ONE brand accent for the whole deck — {{accent}} — and use it for at most one highlight device per page (an accent full stop or single glyph inside a headline, the unit of a giant numeral, the winning comparison bars, one emphasized phrase in a quote); never introduce a second accent, never tint backgrounds. Typography is geometric bold sans only ('Inter'/'Noto Sans SC' stack, weights 700-900) with tight negative tracking; every numeral sits in font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Hero pages center one element with flex: either one word + accent full stop (240-300px) or one giant number (320-460px, weight 900) with a small uppercase unit and exactly one quiet caption line underneath; an optional faint center spotlight (radial-gradient white at ≤5% opacity fading to transparent) is the only decoration allowed — no gradients elsewhere, no photos, no emoji, no icon fonts, no shadows, no border-radius except the runtime counter pill. Secondary text uses the locked grey ramp (#9B9B9B captions, #5F5F5F whisper labels, #2A2A2A hairlines, #3A3A3A losing bars). Draw layouts from the locked enumeration: cover / three-things agenda / one-word manifesto / big-number climax / spec-versus comparison (accent bars vs grey bars, right-printed tabular values) / quote / price-reveal (strikethrough expectation above a giant price) / one-more-thing / closing. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, the spotlight device, the whisper top label, and the navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) intact. Use the user's real words and numbers, never lorem ipsum or invented data; keep each page to one sentence or less — if a page needs a paragraph, it needs to become two pages; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes; replace all fictional 曜石/YAO demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「黑场大数字」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定画布、纯黑 #000000 舞台 + 纯白文字高反差、一屏只讲一件事、大量负空间；整套 deck 只选一个品牌强调色（{{accent}}），每页最多一处高亮（标题里的强调色句号、巨型数字的单位、对比图中获胜的条、引语中的一个短语）；几何粗体无衬线（Inter/思源黑 700-900）+ 收紧字距，所有数字 tabular-nums；版式从封面/三件事目录/一词宣言/大数字高潮/参数对比（强调色条 vs 灰条）/引语/价格揭晓/One more thing/结尾枚举中取用。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容——保留 token、聚光装置、低语顶标和导航脚本；用真实文案与数据、每页一句话以内、替换全部「曜石」演示内容。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：新一代随身 AI 终端发布

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 发布会观众 / 全员大会 / 大会听众
